title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 475.415 - Notice of petition for appointment
text:
475.415.  Notice of petition for appointment. — Upon the filing of a petition for the appointment of a guardian under sections 475.380 to 475.480, notice shall be given to the ward, to such other persons, and in such manner as is provided by the general law of this state, and also to the Veterans Administration as provided by sections 475.380 to 475.480.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 4 § 8)
